/usr/bin/cc -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags CMakeFiles/editor.dir/chunk_operations.c.o CMakeFiles/editor.dir/editor.c.o CMakeFiles/editor.dir/editor_menu.c.o CMakeFiles/editor.dir/editor_window.c.o -o /home/berserker/projects/GQuestRedux/bin/editor.grg  ../../libs/logging/liblogging.a ../../libs/gcurses/libgcurses.a ../../libs/gio/libgio.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so ../../libs/objects/libobjects.a
